violations.text: The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by small flies around garnish container. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Container was placed in dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the bar dish machine (near chemical dispensing mechanism) have an accumulation of rust and residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC will sanitize at the kitchen dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils food storage containers were observed with an accumulation of debris and residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

White rice was observed held at 102 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the kitchen and bar areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PCS was called while on site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
Several stacks of containers were observed with condensation. Equipment and utensils must be properly air dried prior to stacking. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the black carts have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The walls and ceilings throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

The door to the outside, located at the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
Dramha lowboy refrigerator and wok lowboy refrigerator are in poor repair. Service orders in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
Tile observed in poor repair by booth and statue. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
